recap: Added font filetype group with eot/otf/ttf/woff/woff2 extensions, moved eot/ttf/woff out of script group, rebuilt dist
Added --reply flag to filetypes-group using zparseopts, writes to $REPLY instead of echo
Replaced hardcoded yarn.lock/woff2 skips in git-file-edit with filetype-group allowlist (text/script/config), unknown extensions accepted
